description: OpenChannel provides marketplace infrastructure for software/app ecosystems, including app catalog and marketplace management capabilities. Its published developer-facing interface appears to be a Market API for managing and querying marketplace apps and related resources.
summary: OpenChannel exposes one documented HTTP API surface: the OpenChannel Market API at `https://market.openchannel.io/v2`, authenticated with Basic auth per its published OpenAPI document; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.
